jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at CRISIL
jsonLd.description:
CRISIL is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About CRISIL:
CRISIL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CRISIL!
